legacy_formats.notes: Bridge lane remains available during sf1 adoption; slated for removal once successor profile ships.

components.name: sorafs_manifest_chunk_store
components.notes: Streams PoR/manifest reports, enforces registry charter, and exposes profile promotion helpers.

components.name: sorafs_manifest_stub
components.notes: Legacy manifest builder; use `iroha sorafs toolkit pack` for CAR/manifest packaging and keep `--plan` for deterministic revalidation.

components.name: sorafs_provider_advert_stub
components.notes: Legacy offline helper; provider adverts should be produced by the publishing pipeline and validated via `/v1/sorafs/providers`.

components.name: sorafs_fetch
components.notes: Multi-source orchestrator understands range capability hints and validates chunk digests.

components.name: sdk_fixtures_rust_go_ts
components.notes: Cross-language fixtures list canonical handles first and include council signatures.

components.name: torii_gateway_profile_negotiation
components.notes: Implements Accept-Chunker grammar and emits Content-Chunker headers with registry handles.

components.name: carv1_bridge_sha2_256
components.notes: Legacy bridge for clients requesting SHA-256; responses mark legacy=true.

telemetry.name: chunk_fetch_reports
telemetry.notes: Iroha CLI `sorafs toolkit pack` surfaces chunk digests, CAR metadata, and PoR roots for dashboards.

telemetry.name: provider_advert_coverage
telemetry.notes: JSON reports expose capabilities and alias compliance for discovery telemetry.

telemetry.name: gateway_downgrade_monitoring
telemetry.notes: Planned aggregated dashboards for Content-Chunker vs Content-Digest pairings.
